@graph.name: Computer Basics & File Management
@graph.description: Foundational course on computer systems, operating layouts, task shortcuts, folder structuring, and basic typing postures.

@graph.name: Touch Typing Mastery
@graph.description: 6-week keyboard training course building muscle memory to achieve typing speeds of 40+ WPM without looking at the keys.

@graph.name: Visual Block Coding (Scratch)
@graph.description: Learn algorithms, loops, variables, conditional statements, and sprite physics by designing custom arcade games on Scratch.

@graph.name: Generative AI Skills for Students
@graph.description: Introduction to prompt engineering structures (Role, Task, Context, Output) and data security rules when using generative AI tools.

@graph.name: Microsoft Excel & Spreadsheets
@graph.description: Spreadsheet grid navigation, arithmetic calculations, average formulas, and automatic visual chart formatting.

@graph.name: Microsoft PowerPoint & Presentation Design
@graph.description: Designing slide masters, templates, presentation structures, Canva graphics, and public speaking guidelines.

@graph.name: Cyber Safety & Internet Hygiene
@graph.description: Password security, phishing email detection, cookie setups, browser privacy options, and digital footprint management.

@graph.name: Productivity Tools & Cloud Workspaces
@graph.description: Mastering Google Workspace cloud directories, layout margins, indexes, document sharing, and digital layout creations.
